title: [BUG] Rate limiting missing on /tasks endpoint leads to spam/DoS
body:
## Problem
The /tasks endpoint can be hit repeatedly without any rate limiting or throttling.
This enables request spam / DoS and can also flood the task storage.

## Expected behavior
Add basic rate limiting to protect the endpoint.

## Proposed scope
- Implement a simple in-memory rate limiter (per-IP) as middleware.
- Default: 60 requests/min per client IP.
- Return HTTP 429 with a clear message when exceeded.

## Acceptance criteria
- When a client exceeds the limit, response is 429.
- Normal usage remains unaffected.
- Add tests for the limiter.
